data.body: DECISION: DROP. WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE was already removed from code by an earlier config refactor — _display_mode (lookups.py:65) now resolves purely via load_config().ticket.display_mode with no env precedence. Only a docstring comment remained; scrubbed it. grep WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE src/ = CLEAN. ticket.display_mode resolution is covered by existing config tests (full suite green, no regression); no new test needed since there is no new behavior.
